title: alangium salviifolium subsp. sundanum
intro: Alangium salviifolium subsp. sundanum, also known as Sundan Alangium, is a plant species in the Alangium genus, which is a type of flowering plant native to Indonesia and Malaysia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Sundan Alangium include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in local medicine. Sundan Alangium is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
